clues: The computer emits a series of beeps and shows nothing on the screen when powered on.
The beep pattern is consistent with a memory initialization failure according to the motherboard manual.
The computer was recently moved to a new desk location.
Reseating the RAM sticks by removing and reinserting them does not initially resolve the issue.
After cleaning the RAM contacts with a pencil eraser and reseating, the computer boots normally.
